item.title: Application Package Install Wizard [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Application Package Install Wizard [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: VectoR
item.itunes:summary:
Application Package Install Wizard
(Utilities)
A Qt5-based distribution-independent package manager and installer via PackageKit.
Its extra feature, in addition to a nice-looking interface, is its ability later will be to install and manage PIP and NPM modules This development is a modular part of the FusionLogic framework, as sub-project . It is free to use for everyone on the condition of displaying the authors site and observing the GPL3 rules. It is a very simple and eye-catching application, simply click on an RPM or DEB package and install it using the systems PackageKit.

This application is a really easy-to-use piece of software. Just click and install any application (RPM,DEB) package on your favourite system.

Under development:

improving the look and feel
localising the missing strings
monitoring the use of other package manager applications, suspending the installation process
database preloader for faster startup

Awaiting implementation:

Managing NPM modules
Managing PIP modules
Uniform package list, installation of the package manager for batch package management
further integration and optional switching of packagekit-python
integration and optional switching of other package management engines
Any other request package format support

Youtube demos:

* Flatpak install: https://youtu.be/UJw7HwkhXKM?si=ychDO7tSdXAnjBMx
* Simple RPM / Deb / Or other package format: https://youtu.be/TK-iw86_ztw?si=CbE_nHWmiq3etlhJ

[read more]
item.description:
Application Package Install Wizard
(Utilities)
A Qt5-based distribution-independent package manager and installer via PackageKit.
Its extra feature, in addition to a nice-looking interface, is its ability later will be to install and manage PIP and NPM modules This development is a modular part of the FusionLogic framework, as sub-project . It is free to use for everyone on the condition of displaying the authors site and observing the GPL3 rules. It is a very simple and eye-catching application, simply click on an RPM or DEB package and install it using the systems PackageKit.

This application is a really easy-to-use piece of software. Just click and install any application (RPM,DEB) package on your favourite system.

Under development:

improving the look and feel
localising the missing strings
monitoring the use of other package manager applications, suspending the installation process
database preloader for faster startup

Awaiting implementation:

Managing NPM modules
Managing PIP modules
Uniform package list, installation of the package manager for batch package management
further integration and optional switching of packagekit-python
integration and optional switching of other package management engines
Any other request package format support

Youtube demos:

* Flatpak install: https://youtu.be/UJw7HwkhXKM?si=ychDO7tSdXAnjBMx
* Simple RPM / Deb / Or other package format: https://youtu.be/TK-iw86_ztw?si=CbE_nHWmiq3etlhJ

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Application Package Install Wizard
(Utilities)
A Qt5-based distribution-independent package manager and installer via PackageKit.
Its extra feature, in addition to a nice-looking interface, is its ability later will be to install and manage PIP and NPM modules This development is a modular part of the FusionLogic framework, as sub-project . It is free to use for everyone on the condition of displaying the authors site and observing the GPL3 rules. It is a very simple and eye-catching application, simply click on an RPM or DEB package and install it using the systems PackageKit.

This application is a really easy-to-use piece of software. Just click and install any application (RPM,DEB) package on your favourite system.

Under development:

improving the look and feel
localising the missing strings
monitoring the use of other package manager applications, suspending the installation process
database preloader for faster startup

Awaiting implementation:

Managing NPM modules
Managing PIP modules
Uniform package list, installation of the package manager for batch package management
further integration and optional switching of packagekit-python
integration and optional switching of other package management engines
Any other request package format support

Youtube demos:

* Flatpak install: https://youtu.be/UJw7HwkhXKM?si=ychDO7tSdXAnjBMx
* Simple RPM / Deb / Or other package format: https://youtu.be/TK-iw86_ztw?si=CbE_nHWmiq3etlhJ

[read more]

item.title: FIX AIM BOOST NO ROOT FAB [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: FIX AIM BOOST NO ROOT FAB [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
FIX AIM BOOST NO ROOT FAB
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))

[h3] [b] MORE NON ROOTED TWEAKS [/b] [/h3]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2056054/]1.GODSPEED MODE NO ROOT [/url]
[b] THIS APP HAS MORE THAN 30 OPTIONS TO BOOST ANDROID WITHOUT ROOT[/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2058739/]2.NRFO [/url]
[b] NO TOOT FULL OPTIMIZATION [/b]
[url=https://www.pling.com/p/2065508/]3.WISP NO ROOT ENHANCER [/url]
[b] IT WILL ALSO OPTIMIZE YOUR DEVICE [/b]

[h3] [b]SUPPORT[/b] [/h3]
[url=https://godtspeed.xyz]Click here to visit GoDTspeed[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Join Official Channel[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Official Group to Share Your Problem[/url]


[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]

[h3][b]About.[/b][/h3]

GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.


[read more]

GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. [h3][b]About.[/b][/h3]

GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, developed by revWhiteShadow, is a revolutionary module designed to enhance the aiming capabilities of players in online multiplayer games. The main feature of this module is its ability to fix aim assets, ensuring precise and accurate aiming in various gaming scenarios.

One of the common challenges in online multiplayer games is the inconsistency of aim, often caused by factors like latency and input delay. However, with GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, these issues are effectively addressed. The module incorporates advanced algorithms and techniques to minimize gyrodelay, resulting in a significantly improved aiming experience.

By utilizing GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST, players can expect a noticeable reduction in aim drift and smoother tracking of targets. The module intelligently compensates for any discrepancies caused by system lag or controller input delay, allowing players to maintain consistent and reliable aim throughout their gameplay.

Whether engaging in intense first-person shooters or competitive multiplayer battles, GODSPEED FIX AIM BOOST provides players with a powerful tool to elevate their aiming skills and gain a competitive edge. With its innovative technology, this module aims to enhance the overall gaming experience, ensuring precise and accurate aim for players in online multiplayer environments.

item.title: Qmmp [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:title: Qmmp [Audioplayers]
item.itunes:author: trialuser
item.itunes:summary:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
mms support
MPRIS (1.0 and 2.0)
removable device detection (via HAL or UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics (using lyrics.wikia.com)
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC and WavPack)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
Last.fm/Libre.fm scrobbler
CDDB support
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]

Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus

WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect

LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
mms support
MPRIS (1.0 and 2.0)
removable device detection (via HAL or UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics (using lyrics.wikia.com)
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC and WavPack)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
Last.fm/Libre.fm scrobbler
CDDB support
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner

[b]Downloads[/b]
[url]https://qmmp.ylsoftware.com/downloads.php[/url]
[url]https://sourceforge.net/projects/qmmp-dev/files/[/url]
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Qmmp
(Audioplayers)
Qmmp (Qt-based Multimedia Player) is an audio-player, written with help of Qt library.
[b]Supported operating systems:[/b]
GNU/Linux
FreeBSD
Microsoft Windows

[b]Supported formats:[/b]
MPEG1 layer 2/3
Ogg Vorbis
Ogg Opus
Native FLAC, Ogg FLAC
Musepack
WavePack
tracker modules (mod, s3m, it, xm, etc)
ADTS AAC
CD Audio
WMA, Monkey's Audio (and other formats provided by FFmpeg library)
PCM WAVE (and other formats provided by libsndfile library)
midi
SID
chiptune formats (AY, GBS, GYM, HES, KSS, NSF, NSFE, SAP, SPC, VGM, VGZ, VTX)

[b]DSP effects:[/b]
BS2B effect
sample rate converter
LADSPA effects
extra stereo
crossfade

[b]Visual effects:[/b]
projectM visualization
spectrum analyzer

[b]Output system support:[/b]
OSS4 (FreeBSD)
ALSA (Linux)
Pulse Audio
JACK
WaveOut (Win32)
DirectSound (Win32)
WASAPI (Win32)

[b]Other features:[/b]
XMMS and Winamp 2.x skins support
alternative user interface based on standard widgets set
10-band equalizer
MP3, Vorbis, AAC, AAC+ streams support
mms support
MPRIS (1.0 and 2.0)
removable device detection (via HAL or UDisks)
video playback via Mplayer
lyrics (using lyrics.wikia.com)
cover art support
CUE sheet support
embedded CUE support (for FLAC and WavPack)
multiple playlists
automatic charset detection for cue files and ShoutCast metadata
playlist formats: m3u, pls, xspf
ReplayGain support
Last.fm/Libre.fm scrobbler
CDDB support
stream browser
audio formats conveter
external programs execution on track change
ReplayGain scanner

[b]Downloads[/b]

item.title: Memory Card Data Repair Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Data Repair Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrepair
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Data Repair Tool
(Utilities)
MMC data recovery application is useful for retrieval of lost files and folders from memory card missing in case of inappropriate card removal, virus attack and accidental deletion. SanDisk memory stick files recovery software supports various memory cards like XD, SD, MMC, T-Flash and other flash media. Free memory card data retrieval program recover files from memory card even Drive Not Formatted or Drive Not Recognized is displays. PSP memory stick data repair tool supports all storage capacity of memory card. T-flash card files recovery application proficiently works under environment of windows 11, win 10, win 8, Win7, WinXP and Vista operating systems installed laptop or desktop computer. Compact flash card data repair utility retrieves all type of files like exe, avi, mp4, jpeg, rm, DOCX, dat, wav, XLS, jpg, mpeg, wma etc. PSP memory stick data repair software supports all major manufacturers (Olympus, Sony, Transcend, Konica, Kingston, Nikon, Yakumo, Samsung, Cannon, Panasonic etc) made memory card. MMC data rescue utility recovers data from all memory cards plugged in pocket PC, mobile, handy cam, palmtop and similar device attach to computer via USB port. SanDisk memory card repair utility provides interactive graphical user interface to works easily without need of technical knowledge. Features: * PSP memory stick retrieval program supports various capacity memory cards. * Memory card data repair software also restores data from memory card even Drive Not Formatted or Drive Not Recognized message displays. * Scandisk memory card recovery program supports all type of memory card like SD, MS (Micro Stick), MMC, CF (Compact Flash), XD and 3C manufactured by major companies* MMC files repair application restores all type of file with any format.

[read more]
item.description:
Memory Card Data Repair Tool
(Utilities)
MMC data recovery application is useful for retrieval of lost files and folders from memory card missing in case of inappropriate card removal, virus attack and accidental deletion. SanDisk memory stick files recovery software supports various memory cards like XD, SD, MMC, T-Flash and other flash media. Free memory card data retrieval program recover files from memory card even Drive Not Formatted or Drive Not Recognized is displays. PSP memory stick data repair tool supports all storage capacity of memory card. T-flash card files recovery application proficiently works under environment of windows 11, win 10, win 8, Win7, WinXP and Vista operating systems installed laptop or desktop computer. Compact flash card data repair utility retrieves all type of files like exe, avi, mp4, jpeg, rm, DOCX, dat, wav, XLS, jpg, mpeg, wma etc. PSP memory stick data repair software supports all major manufacturers (Olympus, Sony, Transcend, Konica, Kingston, Nikon, Yakumo, Samsung, Cannon, Panasonic etc) made memory card. MMC data rescue utility recovers data from all memory cards plugged in pocket PC, mobile, handy cam, palmtop and similar device attach to computer via USB port. SanDisk memory card repair utility provides interactive graphical user interface to works easily without need of technical knowledge. Features: * PSP memory stick retrieval program supports various capacity memory cards. * Memory card data repair software also restores data from memory card even Drive Not Formatted or Drive Not Recognized message displays. * Scandisk memory card recovery program supports all type of memory card like SD, MS (Micro Stick), MMC, CF (Compact Flash), XD and 3C manufactured by major companies* MMC files repair application restores all type of file with any format.

[read more]

Memory Card Data Repair Tool
(Utilities)
MMC data recovery application is useful for retrieval of lost files and folders from memory card missing in case of inappropriate card removal, virus attack and accidental deletion. SanDisk memory stick files recovery software supports various memory cards like XD, SD, MMC, T-Flash and other flash media. Free memory card data retrieval program recover files from memory card even Drive Not Formatted or Drive Not Recognized is displays. PSP memory stick data repair tool supports all storage capacity of memory card. T-flash card files recovery application proficiently works under environment of windows 11, win 10, win 8, Win7, WinXP and Vista operating systems installed laptop or desktop computer. Compact flash card data repair utility retrieves all type of files like exe, avi, mp4, jpeg, rm, DOCX, dat, wav, XLS, jpg, mpeg, wma etc. PSP memory stick data repair software supports all major manufacturers (Olympus, Sony, Transcend, Konica, Kingston, Nikon, Yakumo, Samsung, Cannon, Panasonic etc) made memory card. MMC data rescue utility recovers data from all memory cards plugged in pocket PC, mobile, handy cam, palmtop and similar device attach to computer via USB port. SanDisk memory card repair utility provides interactive graphical user interface to works easily without need of technical knowledge. Features: * PSP memory stick retrieval program supports various capacity memory cards. * Memory card data repair software also restores data from memory card even Drive Not Formatted or Drive Not Recognized message displays. * Scandisk memory card recovery program supports all type of memory card like SD, MS (Micro Stick), MMC, CF (Compact Flash), XD and 3C manufactured by major companies* MMC files repair application restores all type of file with any format.

item.title: Memory Card Repair Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Repair Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrepair
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Repair Software
(Utilities)
Proficient MMC card recovery program helps user to restore entire deleted or formatted imported documents and files from multimedia memory cards. Company offer XD-Picture memory card utility helps user to revive whole deleted images and photos from formatted memory cards. Comprehensive card recovery software facilitates user to retrieve entire lost or missing data from accidentally damaged memory cards. Specialized Memory Card Repair Software allows user to regain all formatted files from accidentally crashed digital stick. Innovative XD card recovery utility enables user to rescues whole lost videos clips from formatted digital cam recorder memory cards. Provides flash card repair application empowers user to restore entire missing files from corrupted flash memory card devices. Proficient SD card revive software facilitates user to revive all lost or deleted data from memory card in drive not Formatted or drive not recognized situations. Download from www.memorycardrepair.com empowers user to regain entire deleted files from memory cards. Website provides data card recovery software allows user to retrieve entire lost files from entire types memory cards including XD, SD, MMC, flash and digital media. Company provides MMC card repair utility facilitates user to revive all type of multimedia files like avi, mp4, jpeg, jpg, mpeg, wma etc. Website offer data card recover application empowers user to retrieve all missing or formatted data or files from crashed external memory stick. Salient features: - * Innovative memory card retrieval program provides facility to recover entire type of file format. * Comprehensive memory card repair software have ability to supports all major memory cards brands like HP, SanDisk, Samsung, Kingston etc. *Specialized memory card recovery program provides supports to all type of memory card like SD, MMC, CF, XD and etc.* Proficient card repair application recovers all capacity memory cards including 256MB, 512MB, 1GB, 2GB etc.

[read more]

Company provides MMC card repair utility facilitates user to revive all type of multimedia files like avi, mp4, jpeg, jpg, mpeg, wma etc. Website offer data card recover application empowers user to retrieve all missing or formatted data or files from crashed external memory stick. Salient features: - * Innovative memory card retrieval program provides facility to recover entire type of file format. * Comprehensive memory card repair software have ability to supports all major memory cards brands like HP, SanDisk, Samsung, Kingston etc. *Specialized memory card recovery program provides supports to all type of memory card like SD, MMC, CF, XD and etc.* Proficient card repair application recovers all capacity memory cards including 256MB, 512MB, 1GB, 2GB etc.

[read more]

item.title: Digital Pictures Repair Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Pictures Repair Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrepair
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Pictures Repair Software
(Utilities)
Digital picture repair application restores lost images, photos from hard disk and USB drive lost in case of virus attack, accidental deletion or format. Image recovery program restores images from USB removable storage device even it was not recognized by computer. Picture repair program restores photos from all manufacturers (Jet flash, HP, Kodak, Seagate, Transcend, Nikon, Samsung, Konica, Kodak, Canon, Kingston, Panasonic and Sony) made hard disk and USB storage media. Photo undelete software recovers all types of pictures like jpg, jpeg, gif files. Free photo restoration utility efficiently works under the environment of windows 11, win 10, win 8, win7, winXP and Vista operating system installed desktop and laptop computer. Digital image repair software recovers pictures from all type of hard disk (ATA, SATA, SCSI, PATA) and removable USB drives (zip drives, pen drive, digital camera, jump drive, external mobile phone memory, multimedia card, secure digital card, compact flash, smart media, TransFlash card, memory stick etc). Digital still photo recovery tool retrieves pictures files from USB drives even it was not recognized as USB removable media by computer when it was connect. Free photo recovery program provide interactive graphical user interface for user to work easily without need of technical skill. Features:* Free digital image repair tool restores pictures from all major manufactures made USB drive and hard disk. * Picture recovery application is easy to use for all levels (beginner to expert) of users without need of technical knowledge. * Undelete photo software restores all file format pictures like JPG, GIF and JPEG etc. * Digital picture repair utility provides both install and uninstall features.* Software provides interactive graphical user interface with inbuilt help manual.

[read more]

(Utilities)
Digital picture repair application restores lost images, photos from hard disk and USB drive lost in case of virus attack, accidental deletion or format. Image recovery program restores images from USB removable storage device even it was not recognized by computer. item.title: PixelProps Beta [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: PixelProps Beta [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: t3sl4
item.itunes:summary:
PixelProps Beta
(Utilities)
Welcome to the official PixelProps Pling page! This is where you can download the latest Pixel Beta props. These props are designed with a focus on functionality and compatibility.
One of the key features of our Pixel Beta props is their ability to pass both Basic and Device Integrity checks within PlayIntegrity. This ensures that they integrate well with your device and applications.

As the sole developer behind PixelProps, I am committed to maintaining and updating the Pixel Beta props. Your feedback and experience are important to me, and they help in making PixelProps better.

Thank you for choosing PixelProps. Enjoy exploring our Pling page and feel free to reach out if you have any questions or feedback. I’m here to help!
[read more]

item.title: Memory Card Data Repair [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Data Repair [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrepair
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Data Repair
(Utilities)
Do you want to recover vanished data from multimedia memory card in user’s affordable manner? Then install outstanding Memory Card Data Repair program that recuperates missing folders from micro SD card and saved it user defined location in computer system. Camera memory card folders salvager software easily supports retrieval of video, audio, picture files to recoup deleted data from external mobile phone memory card without require any kind of technical skill.

[read more]

item.title: Free Memory Card Repair [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Free Memory Card Repair [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrepair
item.itunes:summary:
Free Memory Card Repair
(Utilities)
Free Memory Card Repair tool allows rescuing different type file and data that delete from mobile phone memory card. www.memorycardrepair.com has ability to download file recovery software for recover missing picture and songs folder from portable storage device. Data recovery software useful for retrieving deleted important data and files from compact flash memory card. Advance file recovery program provides facility to restore erased important contact number from your mobile phone memory card. Free download data recovery software is used to revive deleted picture and images from your computer system. File recovery application has capability to recover each and every data that remove from multimedia memory card. Free download data recovery software helps to revive deleted information and removed detail from portable storage device. Memory card data recovery tool provides facility to restore files that delete from compact flash memory card due to virus attack. Advance file recovery program has capability to retrieve data and some other important information that erased from system due to power failure. Download data recovery application allows rescuing everything that lost from mobile phone memory card due to virus attack. File recovery tool provides facility to recover deleted folder and corrupted files from XD-picture memory card. Advance data recovery software enables to restore important contact number and valuable data that lost from mobile phone due to format. File recovery program is used to rescue removed image, icon and photo from digital camera. Feature:- *Memory card data recovery tool retrieve all type lost data and detail from portable storage device. *Advance file recovery application revive erased important document and data from computer system. *File recovery program easily restore deleted mp3, mp4 songs folder from multimedia memory card. *Download data recovery software easily recover lost icon, images and picture from compact flash card.

[read more]
